overall_justification: The dominant narrative strongly favors the Convênio de Taubaté and the creation of the Caixa de Conversão as crucial for addressing Brazil's financial difficulties and promoting economic growth, aligning with the Expansionist perspective.  The featured opinion piece advocates for a 12d conversion rate and uses Argentina's success as a positive example, directly countering Orthodox criticisms about fiscal probity and adherence to the gold standard at the historical 27d rate.

supporting_evidence.quote: A cláusula 8.a do convênio foi uma revelação patriótica— o unico remédio para o nosso péssimo estado financeiro, resultante dos emprestimos e da consequente e artificial elevação do cambio.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote, from a prominent opinion piece, explicitly frames Article 8 of the Convênio (relating to the Caixa and the loan) as a patriotic solution to Brazil's financial woes, a core tenet of the Expansionist view.

supporting_evidence.quote: Com o regimen proposto pelo convênio... a Republica Argentina restaurou o seu credito e está se enriquecendo rapidamente. Com o nosso regimen as industrias nacionaes e o commercio agonizam e o Brasil está pobre.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote directly contrasts Argentina's economic success under a similar scheme with Brazil's struggles, advocating for the adoption of the Caixa as a path to recovery and growth, a key Expansionist argument.

supporting_evidence.quote: O convênio neste artigo propõe a creação de uma caixa no Thesouro para dois fins: emittir papel convertível em ouro, á vontade do portador—e comprar o nosso papel moeda pelo preço que o portador quizer vendel-o.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This clarifies the proposed function of the Caixa as envisioned by the Convênio, emphasizing currency convertibility and flexibility, aligning with Expansionist goals.
